allowances.reason: Legacy row still inherits shared non-EV gearbox data until an exact EV drivetrain row is captured.
Legacy row still inherits shared non-EV gearbox data until an exact EV drivetrain row is captured.

The exact late-cycle TT 40 TFSI S tronic row carries the official Audi raw gearbox ratios alongside split final-drive values, so the grouped row can expose a non-monotonic raw ratio list even though the OEM overall gearing is production-valid.
